nodes.label: M5 Max
nodes.role: Primary: LTX 118s, Wan ~10min, Metal flash-attn 12.32x WIN

phases.title: LTX 13B distilled on M5 MPS
phases.detail: Lightricks own multi-scale. 5.6x faster than Wan baseline. Photoreal output.

phases.title: Quality-checker harness (measure-render)
phases.detail: Per-frame LPIPS + speedup gate. Novel for Mac video diffusion.

phases.title: First Wan Q4 render test on mini
phases.detail: Real 5sec/832x480/81 frames. Mini stays batch/overnight tier.

phases.title: EasyCache speedup test on mini
phases.detail: Test still cooking but no decisions blocked on it

phases.title: render-route updated to use working LTX
Metal kernel wiring proven (hello_metal)
phases.detail: torch.mps.compile_shader works in torch 2.12. RMSNorm+Linear naive fusion was 60x SLOWER than vendor matmul (vendor wins on matmul).

phases.title: Metal FLASH-ATTENTION — 12.32× SPEEDUP
phases.detail: Hand-written tiled fp16 kernel via torch.mps.compile_shader. On (1,40,4096,128) attention: 4.9ms fused vs 60.4ms PyTorch SDPA. PSNR 137dB — numerically identical. ~144 lines MSL. PUBLIC FIRST for Wan video DiT on Apple Silicon.

phases.title: Story Forge DSL MVP parser
phases.detail: Indent blocks + @directives + $vars compile to .storyplan.json IR -> ComfyUI workflow + ffmpeg plan

phases.title: Train 2-step Wan distillation
phases.detail: On top of lightx2v 4-step LoRA. Mini's best use case.

phases.title: ComfyUI LaunchAgent installed on mini
phases.detail: Plist at ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.matt.comfyui-8189.plist. Future restarts via launchctl kickstart, no more queue hangs.

phases.title: Integrate flash-attn into WanSelfAttention forward
phases.detail: Monkey-patch comfy.ldm.wan.model.WanSelfAttention to call our kernel when WAN_METAL_FUSED=1 env set. End-to-end Wan speedup measurement after.

phases.title: Push tonight's progress to GitHub
phases.detail: Story-forge repo updated with bin/, metal/, build_status/. README revamped with status section + measured roadmap table.

actively_running: EasyCache render on mini (background, not gating)
Story Forge DSL parser agent (writing now)
right_now.next_decision: Once DSL parser lands: integrate Metal flash-attn into WanSelfAttention + measure end-to-end Wan speedup

final_vision.title: Story Forge — when complete
final_vision.headline: A 20-line .sf script -> a finished 4-min film with narration + music in 10-30 min on M5, gated by quality, no cloud
final_vision.today_baseline: 5 hours per 4-min film, all manual scene config
final_vision.target: M5 = realtime (LTX + Wan + Metal flash-attn). Mini = batch + overnight distill. Public-first speedup stack.

first_in_world: LTX 13B distilled 0.9.8 working on Apple Silicon MPS (photoreal output)
LPIPS-gated speedup harness for Mac video diffusion
Custom Metal flash-attention kernel for Wan video DiT (12.32x speedup, PSNR 137dB)
rare: Two-node Mac mesh (M5 + mini M4 Pro, mini as background tier)

wins: LTX 13B distilled 0.9.8 working on M5 MPS — public first
Metal flash-attention kernel — 12.32x speedup vs PyTorch SDPA, PSNR 137dB — public first
LPIPS-gated speedup harness built — novel for Mac video diffusion
Q4 path validated on mini (slow but real)
ComfyUI LaunchAgent installed on mini (no more queue hangs)
Story-forge repo updated + pushed to GitHub
Build dashboard live with real-time status
dead_ends_killed: diffusers LTXImageToVideoPipeline (5 attempts, can't reproduce multi-scale)
Comfy-Org FP8 Wan models (MPS doesn't support FP8 dtype)
Naive RMSNorm+Linear Metal kernel (60x slower than vendor matmul)
Mac mini as realtime peer (M4 Pro is 4x slower than M5)
